title: A Raisin in the Sun
author: Lorraine Hansberry
content: “It’s life, Mama! ... It’s all simply a matter of dreams.”

title: As I Lay Dying
author: William Faulkner
action: Accept the absurdity of internal logic.

title: Ethan Frome
author: Edith Wharton
content: “I am a poor man, but I am a man of my word.”
